title: Scan config for secret and state risks
description: Statically inspect HCL/tfvars/backend for hardcoded secrets, missing locking, and local state on shared projects.
body: Use when reviewing a Terraform repo for safety before changes. Actions: grep .tf and tfvars for literal credentials/keys and unmarked sensitive values, check the backend block for remote state with locking (not local), and confirm provider versions and the lock file are present. Report each finding with file/line and severity. Do not modify resources. This skill exposes capability only and must not run init/plan/apply without runtime permission. Validation signals include a clean scan: no literal secrets, remote locked state, pinned providers. Risk boundary: hardcoded secrets and unlocked shared state are blocking findings; recommend remediation and escalation rather than proceeding to apply.
